title: Enclosure Line
plain_language_rule: Type 'Encl:' in uppercase followed by a colon on the second line below the last line of the reference block (or via/subject line if no references). List enclosures using lowercase letters in parentheses: (a), (b), (c), etc. A single enclosure is listed without a preceding number. When an enclosure is sent under separate cover, note '(sep cover)' after the enclosure description.
source_text: Type 'Encl:' in uppercase followed by a colon, on the second line below the last line of the reference block or, if no references, below the via block or subject line. Identify each enclosure by a lowercase letter in parentheses. When an enclosure is sent under separate cover, type '(sep cover)' after the enclosure description.
renderer_impact: Enclosure line must appear on the second line below the last reference line (or via/subject line if no references). 'Encl:' in uppercase followed by a colon. Enclosures identified by lowercase letters in parentheses.
notes: The enclosure line uses 'Encl:' followed by a colon. A single enclosure is listed without a preceding number. When an enclosure is sent under separate cover, '(sep cover)' is typed after the enclosure description. No document may be both a reference and an enclosure.
